name: terradev-mcp
description: Complete Agentic GPU Infrastructure for Claude Code — Full training lifecycle (train/stop/resume/monitor/checkpoint CRUD), inference deployment with cost guardrails, manifest-cached provisioning with drift detection, smart deployment with AI-ranked options, model orchestrator (multi-model GPU sharing), warm pool management, budget-aware auto-scaling, workflow pipelines (YAML declarative), GitOps (ArgoCD/Flux), InferX serverless, HuggingFace Spaces, session-state resources (active_context/instances/jobs/spend/alerts), agent-oriented recommendations (suggest_action/recommend), cost confirmation gates, and Terraform-powered parallel provisioning across 20 cloud providers (incl. Alibaba, OVHcloud, FluidStack, Hetzner, SiliconFlow)
author: Terradev
